notes:
v1.0.27 — Full context menu parity on Quick Access & Drives panels

• Quick Access and Drives panels now have the same full context menu as the file pane
• Pin to Quick access / Unpin from Quick access
• Give access to — Windows sharing wizard
• Restore previous versions
• Scan with Windows Defender
• Pin to Start
• Format… (drive roots only)
• New → Folder
• New → Text Document (creates file + enters rename)
• Works in both main sidebar and split-pane sidebars
